name.zh: Lotus' Modified TerraGroup Labs Access Keycard ★
name.en: Lotus' Modified TerraGroup Labs Access Keycard

description.zh:
跳蚤市场: 900,000₽ | 物品价值: 900,000 | Therapist报价: 567,000₽购买渠道 @ 莲花 等级4 < 钥匙卡 x20 + U盘 x3 | Σ ≈ 2,250,225₽

A modified version of a single-use United Security-issues TerraGroup Labs access keycard. Essentially providing unlimited access to the TerraGroup laboratory. Painted in a certain shade of blue, Lotus' signature color, to distinguish it from ordinary access keycards. Coincidentally, an ex-Terragroup employee who is now the leader of one of the local bandit groups, used the same shade of blue to mark the key to his office inside the Terragroup laboratory.
